items.title: Illumina Stock Tumbles Nearly 5% Overnight On Robinhood As China Adds ILMN, Calvin Klein Owner PVH To 'Unreliable Entities List' Amid Trade War With US
items.author: Rishabh Mishra
items.description: Illumina and PVH Corp, the owner of Calvin Klein, have been added to China's 'unreliable entities list' amid the ongoing trade war with the US, leading to a significant drop in their stock prices.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Illumina's stock fell nearly 4% on Robinhood overnight after China added the company to its 'unreliable entities list', citing disruption of normal market transactions and harm to the legitimate rights and interests of Chinese enterprises.
PVH Corp, the owner of Calvin Klein, also saw its stock drop over 7% on Monday after being added to China's 'unreliable entities list' for similar reasons as Illumina.
China also announced an investigation into Alphabet's Google for alleged anti-monopoly practices, but this was not the main focus of the article.
China also announced an investigation into Alphabet's Google for alleged anti-monopoly practices, but this was not the main focus of the article.
The S&P 500 index ETF (SPY) closed 0.67% lower on Monday, likely due to the broader market impact of the trade tensions between the US and China.
